title: 🔂 Fourier Dreamspace (Wave Decomposition)
name: Fourier Dreamspace (Wave Decomposition)
what_it_is: Fourier transforms break complex patterns into pure wave components—used in audio, image compression, and metaphoric dream rendering.
how_to_use: her body phases in Fourier slices—each frequency a different mood encoded in form
the dream unravels into sine components—color, shape, and emotion broken into wave
animation_behavior: Parts of body flicker in frequency, wave forms emerge and resolve, scene flows in harmonic layers ---
